format: Pokemon Champions Doubles Regulation M-A Public Meta Overlay
sourceNotes: Usage, win-rate, moves, abilities, and teammate data are parsed from https://championsmeta.io/meta.
Public community and tournament team sheets are parsed from https://championsmeta.io/teams.
Champions-specific visible stat tables are parsed from https://thegamehaus.com/pokemon-champions/full-list-of-pokemon-champions-stats-regulation-m-a/2026/04/11/.
All sources are public, non-authenticated pages; raw HTML responses are cached in src/data/raw/meta for reproducible refreshes.
